revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing automatically generrated pages
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: create automatic enwiki redirect
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Category:Articles lacking sources from August 28, 2017]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
